ranked_movies.title: The Lobster
ranked_movies.reason: The central topic of the highest-scoring post; described as hilarious, horrifying, and deeply weird, sparking extensive discussion and numerous recommendations for similar films.

ranked_movies.title: The Act of Killing
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended multiple times as a mind-blowing, shocking, and unsettling documentary that changes one's perspective.

ranked_movies.title: Three Identical Strangers
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently recommended as a shocking and mind-blowing documentary that leaves a lasting impact.

ranked_movies.title: Irreversible
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed as a profoundly disturbing and traumatic film with intentional, artful techniques to unsettle the viewer.

ranked_movies.title: The Killing of a Sacred Deer
ranked_movies.reason: Directly recommended as the next logical step after 'The Lobster' from the same director, noted for its unique and unsettling style.

ranked_movies.title: Happiness
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a chilling 'comedy' and a film that is deeply unsettling and thought-provoking.

ranked_movies.title: Kids
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a film that shakes viewers to their core, with an ending burned into memory.

ranked_movies.title: Logan
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a movie that exceeded all expectations, described as a brutal, compelling masterpiece in the superhero genre.

ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as an intense, eye-opening documentary series that is shocking and impactful.

ranked_movies.reason: Noted as an extremely dark film that shakes viewers to their core, mentioned alongside other traumatic cinema.

ranked_movies.title: Requiem for a Dream
ranked_movies.reason: The catalyst for the request for traumatizing films; described as a genuinely good movie that severely fucks you up with intention.

ranked_movies.title: Dogtooth
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as another film by Yorgos Lanthimos that leaves a lasting, unsettling impression.

ranked_movies.title: Galaxy Quest
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a film that far exceeded low expectations, beloved for its humor and originality.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon

ranked_movies.title: The Squid and the Whale
